Great attempt at showing Togo to the world ! Nice effort!! 
HOWEVER kindly provide accurate and true  representation of the country. In this video we saw villages in Kenya , Tanzania, Malawi , Zimbabwe being shown as part of Togo.. Lome the capital city of Togo is not made  only of dirt roads and small streets .The video did not show the financial districts and vibrant beach side properties . Once again great Attempt!! but it could be way better with a bit more research and documentation..
